results.title: Bobbin lace — Wikipedia
results.judge_reason: Pure source-domain encyclopedia article on lace craft; describes pricking and twist/cross but contains no LLM, model-merge, or subspace content.

results.title: Open and Closed Methods of Making Lace (dissertation)
results.judge_reason: Dissertation on lace construction methods; no LLM or merge operation mentioned in title/snippet.

results.title: Dressing a Lace Pillow / Making a Pricking — Jean Leader
results.judge_reason: Practical pillow-dressing and pricking-making guide; no model merging or LLM content.

results.title: Developing a Mathematical Model for Bobbin Lace (2014)
results.judge_reason: Source-domain math (braid-on-pricking-graph) explicitly noted as 'not LLM'; not an LLM operation.

results.title: Systematic Study of Model Merging Techniques in LLMs (2025/11)
results.judge_reason: Surveys multiple merge methods including subspace approaches but does not package them as a finite-alphabet two-op (T/X) program over a pre-authored pricking with sprig-then-ground composition.

results.title: Subspace-Boosted Model Merging (2025/6)
results.judge_reason: Extracts dominant singular directions per task and recombines; loosely resembles rotate-plus-swap but lacks the discrete two-op alphabet, pricking graph, and sprig-then-ground program structure.

results.title: Merging Beyond: Streaming LLM Updates via Activation-Guided Rotations (2026/2)
results.judge_reason: Rotation-then-average is one twist-like and one cross-like step but is not a programmable T/X calculus over a pricking lattice with subspace exchange and sprig-then-ground composition; functional equivalence below 0.7.

results.title: Mediator: Memory-efficient LLM Merging with Routing (2025/2)
results.judge_reason: Layer-wise selective averaging plus per-input routing is fundamentally different from a static pricking + T/X schedule with no per-input router.

fail_reason: No result satisfied any branch of the OR rule; max functional_equivalence was 0.55 and max keyword_overlap was 1.
